REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3660 20th Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110-2344)
Off Calendar Nov-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Avid Alavi, via ZOOM, for Bennett Hong, via ZOOM, Trustee; Payam Nejad, Real Estate Agent for buyers; Edward Carcamo, via ZOOM, Beneficiary.

The court questions why the real property was not listed on the Final Inventory and Appraisal. Ms. Alavi reports that when the court appointed her client as Successor Trustee the order did not specify that the matter was being placed under court supervision. Ms. Alavi provides additional oral testimony in support of her client's position. The court advises Ms. Alavi that it is satisfied with her advocacy. The sale was confirmed at $1,275,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,212,000 is required.

Mr. Caracamo advises that he objects to the sale as he believes that the real property is worth more. Ms. Alavi provides testimony regarding her client's efforts in working with the real estate agent to list the property since July of this year and continued being marketed even after the current bid had been accepted. Mr. Nejad confirms Ms. Alavi's testimony. The court then offers Ms. Carcamo a summary of the court's process regarding the sale of real property in probate matters and denies Mr. Carcamo's objection in open court and reconfirms the sale.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar May-17-2021 Continued To Jun-01-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Zabronsky, via by ZOOM, counsel for David Carcamo, Thelma Gutierrez and Gilda Cano, Beneficiaries; Ciaran O'Sullivan, via ZOOM, counsel for Claudia Arostegui and Gabriela Carcamo, Respondents; Robert Cross, via ZOOM, counsel for seven Beneficiaries; Joseph Gruber, via ZOOM, counsel for Jorge Carcamo, Respondent.

At the outset, the court confirms with Mr. Gruber whether an accounting has been prepared by Jorge Carcamo. Matter called. Mr. Poniatowski stated that they agree with the tentative ruling re: the Demurrer with one condition. Mr. Poniatowski requested that all current pleadings be filed in one pleading. Mr. O'Sullivan joined in that request of their being one pleading filed by Mr. Skootsky. Brief discussions are held. At the conclusion of discussions, the Court directed Mr. Skootsky to file an amended petition encompassing everything.

The Court adopted the tentative ruling on the NOTICE OF DEMURRER AND DEMURRER OF RESPONDENT JORGE E CARCAMO TO PETITION AND AMENDMENT TO PETITION OF PETITIONERS ISABEL AROSTEGUI, ARISTIDES CARCAMO, EDUARDO CARCAMO, NADIA MERLO, AMANDA HOSEA, JESSICA HOSEA AND JONATHAN HOSEA as follows: Demurrer to Petition and Amendment to Petition is sustained with leave to amend.
